items.title: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
items.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

items.title: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
items.summary: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.

items.title: World Cup referee denied US entry arrives home to hero's welcome in Somalia
items.summary: Omar Artan vows to officiate at the 2030 tournament instead, following his ban from entering the US.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美伊和談拖太久 川普放話：伊朗必須付出代價

items.title: 英智庫：台海衝突衝擊國際經濟 恐如第三次世界大戰
items.summary: 英國智庫「國際戰略研究所」（IISS）今天發布「台灣海峽危機或衝突對馬來西亞經濟的影響：可能情境分析」報告。IISS分析指出，台海衝突情境所引發的全球經濟衝擊，有如引發第三次世界大戰。  ...…
